bullets.text: Usage summary + breakdown render correctly when gateway usage contract is available.

assertions.test_name: renders today/week usage summaries and breakdowns when contract is available

bullets.text: Usage module shows explicit "Not available" state when contract is unavailable or required fields are invalid.

assertions.test_name: shows explicit not-available state when usage contract is unavailable
disables charts when required usage fields are missing

bullets.text: Missing optional `by_job`/`by_card` slices keep summary/breakdown active and mark correlation as unavailable.

assertions.test_name: keeps summaries visible when optional correlation slices are missing

bullets.text: Usage freshness handling is explicit: stale warning at >15 minutes and trend-limited mode at >60 minutes.

assertions.test_name: shows stale warning when usage data is older than 15 minutes
limits trend claims when usage data is older than 60 minutes

bullets.text: Budget threshold warnings are concise and non-spammy when provider usage ratios exceed warning/critical thresholds.

assertions.test_name: shows concise budget warning when usage thresholds are breached
